name: Mischa Auer
abstract: Mischa Auer (born Mikhail Semyonovich Unkovsky; Russian: Михаил Семёнович Унковский; 17 November 1905 – 5 March 1967) was a Russian-American actor who moved to Hollywood in the late 1920s. He first appeared in film in 1928.

concerts.label: Barry Gray's New Year's Eve Show

about_quotes.speaker: Charlie Barnet
about_quotes.evidence: We went into the Paramount Theater, my first time in the Paramount Theater, with Dorothy Lamour and Mischa Auer, and that was our first of quite a few Paramount engagements.
